hero.title: Together, let's build something that lasts.
hero.subtitle: I design robust, scalable, and sustainable architectures—foundations that support your product's growth over time.

homePageFreelanceSection.title: You have a project or a specific need?
homePageFreelanceSection.text: I design custom web applications, business software, and professional websites that are user-friendly, reliable, and scalable.
homePageFreelanceSection.cta: Learn more about my freelance services

feature1.title: More than just a doer
feature1.text: Thanks to my background in digital and mobile design, I don't just write code. I bring a critical and constructive perspective to every aspect of your project.

feature2.title: Concrete foundations
feature2.text: My specialty is architecture. I build sustainable, scalable solutions that can accommodate your product's growth over time.

feature3.title: User-centered
feature3.text: Perfect code is meaningless if the product doesn't meet a need. I put user experience and functionality at the heart of my development work.

step1.title: The Beginnings
step1.text: I got started in web design in 2019 after doing an internship, and I haven't stopped since. Now I want to make it my career.

step2.title: Evolution
step2.text: After graduating from high school with a STI2D diploma and honors, I began a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science with a focus on AI Development.

step3.title: Today
step3.text: I'm an entrepreneur, co-founder of a startup, and freelance developer—I make a living doing what I love.

hero.title: Blog
hero.subtitle: Thoughts on architecture, web development, and the practices that make products last.

blogSubscription.title: Never miss an article
blogSubscription.text: Get an email whenever a new article is published. No spam — unsubscribe anytime.

contactModal.title: Let's start a project
contactModal.subtitle: I'll reply within 48 hours.
contactModal.successText: I'll get back to you very soon.

hero.label: Freelance — Custom web development
hero.title: Business software, websites, and custom web platforms.
hero.subtitle: I design clear, reliable, and scalable web solutions for businesses, independents, and project owners who need a specific challenge turned into a concrete tool.

needs.item1Text: Centralize your data in a clear, accessible tool.
needs.item2Text: Reduce repetitive tasks and manual errors.
needs.item3Text: Present your business with a more professional image.
needs.item4Text: Let your clients, members, or teams access a service.

services.service1Desc: To build a tool tailored to your way of working: internal tracking, request management, dashboards, client portals, automation, or admin interfaces.
services.service1Ideal: SMEs, associations, internal teams, independents with specific processes.
services.service1Examples: Lightweight CRM · Dashboard · Client portal · Back-office
services.service2Desc: To clearly present your business, reassure your visitors, and make it easy to get in touch — with a fast, responsive, and scalable website.
services.service2Ideal: Freelancers, artisans, consultants, associations, small businesses.
services.service3Desc: For projects that require user accounts, manageable content, a database, advanced forms, or external integrations.
services.service3Ideal: Project owners, startups, agencies, businesses with specific web needs.

method.step1Text: A conversation about your needs, constraints, and goals.
method.step2Text: Define useful features, priorities, and scope.
method.step3Text: Screen structure, user flows, and technical choices.
method.step4Text: Build the solution on a clean, maintainable, and scalable foundation.
method.step5Text: Deployment, testing, adjustments, and ongoing support.

why.intro: I don't just produce pages or features. My role is to understand your need, structure a realistic solution, and build a reliable tool you can actually use.
why.arg1Text: I help you clarify the need before building.
why.arg2Text: UI, business logic, database, API, deployment.
why.arg3Text: Maintainable code, clean structure, room to evolve.
why.arg4Text: Accessible explanations, even without a technical background.

cta.title: You have a project or a specific need?
cta.text: Simply tell me what you'd like to build, improve, or automate. I'll help you figure out the best approach.
